settings.heading: DESIGN YOUR GI IN 3D
settings.text: Design your Brazilian Jiu Jitsu gi exactly how you envision it, with dynamic customization options that let you express your creativity effortlessly.

settings.heading: BROOKLYN NEW YORK
settings.text: For us, crafting a gi is more than just a business—it's a calling, a labor of love that resonates with every practitioner who steps onto the mat. It's the artistry, the passion, and the unwavering dedication that define our Brooklyn-based atelier. We believe that a custom-made gi is not merely a piece of fabric; it is a manifestation of one's journey, a tangible expression of individuality on the canvas of combat.

settings.heading: DESIGN YOUR RASHGUARD IN 3D
settings.text: Design your rashguard exactly how you envision it, with dynamic customization options that let you express your creativity effortlessly.

settings.heading: Your Vision Brought To Life
settings.text: At DSPLN we are committed to crafting more than just a kimono; we strive to create a personalized experience that embodies the spirit of tradition, quality, and individuality. We are not just artisans; we are collaborators, working hand in hand with our customers to achieve perfection in every stitch, and bring your Jiu-Jitsu journey to life.

settings.heading: WOMENS CUSTOM GI
settings.text: Craft your Brazilian Jiu Jitsu gi to match your vision, offering dynamic customization options that allow you to effortlessly express your creativity. Tailored specifically for women, from selecting colors for each element to incorporating personalized patches and embroidery, customize every aspect to showcase your personality and dedication.
settings.point_one: Change color of every component including stitching.
settings.point_two: Add up to 8 logos and art. Add text to your belt
settings.point_three: Any sizes for the kimono, belt, and pants, ensuring a perfect fit.

settings.heading: OUR PHILOSOPHY
settings.text: Discipline is the cornerstone upon which mastery is built, both in craft and in life. It is the unwavering commitment to the pursuit of excellence, the relentless drive to push beyond perceived limits, and the steadfast dedication to honing one's skills day in and day out.

settings.heading: KIDS CUSTOM GI
settings.text: With a range of customizable features, kids can let their creativity shine as they design their perfect training gear. Whether it's selecting colors for each part, adding unique patches, or customizing embroidery, every detail can mirror their individual style and love for the sport. Imagine the excitement of stepping onto the mat in a gi that they've played a part in creating—it's sure to ignite their passion for training!
settings.point_one: Change color of every component including stitching.
settings.point_two: Add up to 8 logos and art. Add text to your belt
settings.point_three: Any sizes for the kimono, belt, and pants, ensuring a perfect fit.

settings.heading: NEWSLETTER
settings.text: Get updates on new products, sales and events.
